name: GOLFTEC St. Petersburg
about: GOLFTEC is a golf instruction and club fitting center that uses technology-based coaching methods. The facilities are equipped with advanced motion tracking technology like OPTIMOTION, high-speed cameras, and launch monitors to analyze swings and provide data-driven feedback. Services include personalized golf lessons, custom club fitting, and practice memberships. GOLFTEC caters to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to experienced players, with a focus on structured improvement plans and measurable results through technology and expert coaching.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using advanced motion tracking technology
Certified PGA coaches with personalized improvement plans
Practice memberships with access to training bays and launch monitors
Custom club fitting with data-optimized equipment recommendations
Seamless online booking process for lessons and fittings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and offers custom club fitting services if you need equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink services are mentioned for GOLFTEC locations, so it's best to assume outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: While specific timing isn't mentioned, typical simulator rounds usually take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth golfers, with technology and coaching tailored to help young players improve their game.
